articles.summary: Credit: Brady Snyder / Android Authority TL;DR Google Home is rolling out new Gemini for Home early access updates and Google Home app 4.16 improvements. Gemini can now connect saved household details, like a nanny’s name, to camera-history questions, with timers and alarms also getting speed improvements. Smart displays are getting thumbs-up/down feedback buttons for voice command responses, while the app adds thermostat and QR-code setup improvements. Google Home’s big Gemini upgrade always had a certain allure. We’ve seen enough sci-fi movies to know how useful an all-knowing assistant running your home could be, but Gemini for Home hasn’t reached that futuristic stage just yet. articles.title: Android and iPhone owners can finally text each other securely
articles.summary: Credit: Ryan Haines / Android Authority TL;DR End-to-end encryption for RCS messaging is rolling out in beta to iPhone users running iOS 26.5. iPhone owners will need to be on a supported carrier’s network to have access to the feature. Android owners will need to have the latest version of Google Messages installed. Android users have long been able to enjoy private conversations over text due to end-to-end encryption (E2EE) on rich communication services (RCS). While this has not been the case for chats between Android and iPhone, Apple added interoperable E2EE for RCS to the recently rolled out iOS 26.5 release candidate. Now the privacy feature is finally here to keep your messages private, regardless of who you’re texting. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: Three things in AI to watch, according to a Nobel-winning economist
articles.summary: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here . A few months before he was awarded the Nobel Prize in economics in 2024, Daron Acemoglu published a paper that earned him few fans in Silicon Valley. Contrary to what Big Tech CEOs had been promising—an overhaul of all white-collar work—Acemoglu estimated that AI would give only a small boost to US productivity and would not obviate the need for human work. It’s okay at automating certain tasks, he wrote, but some jobs will be perfectly fine. Two years later, Acemoglu’s measured take has not caught on. Chatter about an AI jobs apocalypse pops up everywhere from Senator Bernie Sanders’s rallies to conversations I overhear in line at the grocery store. So

The same models also go rogue when the model’s assigned goal conflicts with an organization’s changing strategic business direction. articles.title: Europe Exports Spyware to Human Rights Abusers, Watchdog Says
articles.summary: European companies have sold controversial surveillance technologies to countries known for violating human rights, a new report has found.
articles.title_zh: 歐洲向人權侵犯國家出口監控軟體，監察組織稱
articles.summary_zh: 一份新報告發現，歐洲公司向已知侵犯人權的國家出售了有爭議的監控技術。

articles.title: Korean Stocks Swing as Policymaker Mulls AI Dividend
articles.summary: A South Korean policymaker has suggested paying citizens a “dividend” using taxes on AI profits, fueling sharp swings in Korean stocks. According to Franklin Templeton’s Christy Tan, such programs show that “Asian economies do want to provide a signal of ownership in the shared future that involves digitalization and AI.”
articles.title_zh: 韓國股票波動，政策制定者考量 AI 分紅
articles.summary_zh: 一位韓國政策制定者建議利用 AI 利潤稅來向公民支付「分紅」，引發韓國股票急劇波動，表明亞洲經濟體希望在涉及 AI 的共同未來中提供所有權信號。

articles.title: Australia Watchdog Says Money Launderers Ramping Up AI for Scams
articles.summary: Australia’s financial crimes watchdog warned of a heightened threat of money laundering linked to artificial intelligence that has been used by crooks to scale up activities, automate processes and create fake documents.
articles.title_zh: 澳洲監管機構稱洗錢犯罪分子加緊利用 AI 進行詐騙
articles.summary_zh: 澳洲金融犯罪監管機構警告稱，與人工智慧相關的洗錢威脅加劇，犯罪分子利用 AI 來擴大活動規模、自動化流程並創建虛假文件。

articles.title: Korea Roils Markets by Floating ‘Citizen Dividend’ From AI Tax
articles.summary: A top South Korean policymaker said the nation should pay citizens a “dividend” using taxes on AI profits, underscoring growing pressure on authorities to redistribute gains from a boom that has enriched chipmakers like Samsung Electronics Co. and SK Hynix Inc.
articles.title_zh: 韓國推出「公民分紅」AI 稅計劃掀起市場波瀾
articles.summary_zh: 一位韓國高級政策制定者表示該國應利用 AI 利潤稅向公民支付「分紅」，反映出當局面臨的日益增長的壓力，要求重新分配來自已使 Samsung Electronics 和 SK Hynix 等晶片製造商獲益的繁榮中的收益。

articles.title: S&P Rises as Chipmakers Lift Stocks | The Close 5/11/2026
articles.summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Bank of America Securities' Jill Carey Hall, Brown Harris Stevens CEO Bess Freedman, Jeffries' Brian Tanquilut, Grain CEO & Founder David Grain, Cambria Investment Management's Mebane Faber, Hirtle & Co.'s Founder & Executive Chair Jon Hirtle, Oliver Wyman Partner Daniel Tannebaum, 55/Redefined Group's CEO Lyndsey Simpson & KPMG Chief Economist Diane Swonk. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 標普 500 指數上漲，晶片製造商提振股票｜收盤報告 5/11/2026
articles.summary_zh: Bloomberg Television 為您帶來華爾街收盤前後最新的新聞和分析。今日嘉賓包括美銀證券的 Jill Carey Hall、Brown Harris Stevens 首席執行官 Bess Freedman 及 Jeffries 的 Brian Tanquilut。

articles.title: What’s Next for Telecom and Digital Infrastructure
articles.summary: Grain Management CEO and founder David Grain discusses what's next for telecom and digital infrastructure. He sees real workloads absorbing infrastructure and says they're 'very' active in deploying capital. He speaks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 電信和數字基礎設施的下一步發展
articles.summary_zh: Grain Management 首席執行官兼創辦人 David Grain 討論電信和數字基礎設施的未來，他認為真實工作負載將吸收基礎設施，並表示他們在部署資本方面「非常」活躍。

articles.title: GitLab Says Will Cut Jobs to Spend on Growth in ‘Agentic Era’
articles.summary: GitLab Inc., which makes software that helps developers on coding projects, said it is cutting jobs to free up money to spend on the market opportunity for artificial intelligence agents.
articles.title_zh: GitLab 表示將裁員以在「代理時代」中投入增長資金
articles.summary_zh: 提供協助開發人員進行編碼專案軟體的 GitLab Inc. 表示將裁員，以騰出資金投入人工智慧代理的市場機會。

articles.title: Software Firm ServiceNow Plans to Raise $4 Billion in Bond Sale
articles.summary: Software company ServiceNow Inc. is looking to raise about $4 billion from a potential US high-grade bond sale tied to the software firm’s recent acquisitions.
articles.title_zh: 軟體公司 ServiceNow 計劃透過債券銷售籌資 40 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 軟體公司 ServiceNow Inc. 計畫透過美國投資級債券銷售籌集約 40 億美元，用於該公司近期的收購。

articles.title: Consumers Still Buying Beauty Products That 'Matter to Them,' Says Sally Beauty CEO
articles.summary: Denise Paulonis, President and CEO of Sally Beauty Holdings, said that the beauty industry remains resilient to concerns around affordability as consumer remain consistent in buying beauty products that 'matter to them' like hair dye and nail accessories even if they are not replacing pricier items. Paulonis said that she remains optimistic about her company's growth as consumers explore new e-commerce avenues like the TikTok Shop. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 消費者仍購買「對他們重要」的美妝產品，Sally Beauty 首席執行官表示
articles.summary_zh: Sally Beauty Holdings 總裁兼首席執行官 Denise Paulonis 表示，儘管對購買力的擔憂，美妝產業仍保持韌性，消費者持續購買對他們「重要」的美妝產品，如髮染和指甲配件，即使他們不再購買更昂貴的產品。

articles.title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Seeks $4.8 Billion in Upsized IPO | Bloomberg Tech 5/11/2026
articles.summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Cerebras’ increased IPO plans as the AI chipmaker and data center operator boosts its offering plans by one-third to as much as $4.8 billion. Plus, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire explains what drove the company’s first-quarter revenue and his vision of an agent-led future. And, Google researchers say they have uncovered the first-ever zero-day attack built by AI. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: AI 晶片製造商 Cerebras 尋求在上調的 IPO 中籌資 48 億美元｜Bloomberg Tech 5/11/2026
articles.summary_zh: Bloomberg 的 Caroline Hyde 和 Ed Ludlow 討論 Cerebras 增加的 IPO 計劃，這家 AI 晶片製造商和數據中心營運商將其募資額增加三分之一，最高達 48 億美元。

articles.title: Microsoft Targeted $92 Billion Return on Early OpenAI Investment
articles.summary: Microsoft Corp. targeted a $92 billion return from its large early investments in OpenAI, a landmark arrangement that helped usher in the current AI era.
articles.title_zh: 微軟目標從早期 OpenAI 投資中獲得 920 億美元回報
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft Corp. 從其對 OpenAI 的大額早期投資中設定 920 億美元的回報目標，這是幫助開啟當前 AI 時代的具有里程碑意義的安排。

articles.title: Meta Sued by California County Over ‘Scam’ Advertisements
articles.summary: Meta Platforms Inc. was sued by Santa Clara County, California, over allegations that the company “knowingly facilitates and profits from billions of scam advertisements” on its social networks, including Facebook and Instagram.
articles.title_zh: Meta 被加州聖塔克拉拉縣起訴因「詐騙」廣告
articles.summary_zh: Meta Platforms Inc. 被加州聖塔克拉拉縣起訴，指控該公司「故意促進並從其社交網路（包括 Facebook 和 Instagram）上數十億詐騙廣告中獲利」。

articles.title: Rezolve AI CEO Weighs In on Hostile Bid for Commerce.com
articles.summary: Rezolve AI CEO Dan Wagner discusses the reason behind his company’s hostile bid for Commerce.com, including what he called an “embarrassing growth rate” by the takeover target. He joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Rezolve AI 首席執行官對 Commerce.com 敵意收購進行評論
articles.summary_zh: Rezolve AI 首席執行官 Dan Wagner 討論了他公司對 Commerce.com 發起敵意收購的原因，包括他所稱的收購目標「令人尷尬的增長率」。

articles.title: Angi Becomes Latest Company to Announce AI Pivot
articles.summary: Angi CEO Jeff Kip joins Bloomberg’s Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec to discuss the company’s latest earnings, AI efforts, and Angi’s outlook on the housing market. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Angi 成為最新宣佈 AI 轉向的公司
articles.summary_zh: Angi 首席執行官 Jeff Kip 與 Bloomberg 的 Carol Massar 和 Tim Stenovec 討論公司最新的財報、AI 努力和 Angi 對房地產市場的展望。

articles.title: Sutskever Says His OpenAI Stake Worth About $7 Billion
articles.summary: OpenAI co-founder and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever said his stake in the ChatGPT maker is worth roughly $7 billion, making him one of the largest individual shareholders in the artificial intelligence startup.
articles.title_zh: Sutskever 表示其 OpenAI 股份價值約 70 億美元
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 共同創辦人兼前首席科學家 Ilya Sutskever 表示他在 ChatGPT 製造商中的股份價值約 70 億美元，使他成為該人工智慧新創公司最大的個人股東之一。

articles.title: A $400 AI Bet That’s a High-Stakes Wager on the Future of Work
articles.summary: AI is set to have a profound impact on the workforce and productivity, but by how much and how quickly are still being debated and bet on by academics. Bloomberg’s Stacey Vanek Smith describes the $400 wager on the future of work. She joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 一場 400 美元的 AI 賭注：這是對工作未來的高風險押注
articles.summary_zh: AI 將對勞動力和生產力產生深遠影響，但影響幅度和速度仍在被學者們辯論和押注，Bloomberg 的 Stacey Vanek Smith 描述了對工作未來的 400 美元賭注。

articles.title: Rates Just One Factor for Stablecoin Growth, Says Circle CEO
articles.summary: Stablecoin issuer Circle says it’s moving closer to a future where AI agents can make financial transactions. The company saw a 20% revenue surge in its first-quarter, though net income declined amid volatility in cryptocurrency markets. Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 利率只是穩定幣增長的一個因素，Circle 首席執行官表示
articles.summary_zh: 穩定幣發行商 Circle 表示正在更靠近一個 AI 代理可以進行金融交易的未來，公司第一季度收入激增 20%，儘管加密貨幣市場波動導致淨收入下降。

articles.title: BMO's Schleif Says AI Stampede Fueling Rally Beyond Tech
articles.summary: Carol Schleif, chief market strategist for Bank of Montreal, says the buildout of AI infrastructure is lifting a broad cross section of stocks, not just a handful of tech names. She speaks with Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: BMO 的 Schleif 表示 AI 熱潮正推動超越科技股的漲勢
articles.summary_zh: 加拿大蒙特利爾銀行首席市場策略師 Carol Schleif 表示，AI 基礎設施的建設正在推動廣泛的股票漲勢，而不僅僅是少數科技股。

articles.title: Market Optimistic on AI Surge, Ignoring Risks: Noviskis
articles.summary: Jessica Noviskis, OCIO portfolio strategist at Marquette Associates, says market optimism is largely driven by strong earnings and the resurgence of the AI sector despite potential risks. "We are entirely pricing markets off of the good things that are happening," she said, "and ignoring the risks and the war and the potential for inflation and maybe rate hikes." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 市場對 AI 激增樂觀，忽視風險：Noviskis
articles.summary_zh: Marquette Associates 的 OCIO 投資組合策略師 Jessica Noviskis 表示，儘管存在潛在風險，市場樂觀主要受強勁財報和 AI 板塊復甦驅動，投資者正「完全基於正面事物進行定價，而忽視風險」。

articles.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
articles.summary: Linux users have been bitten by yet another vulnerability that gives containers and untrusted users the ability to gain root access, marking the second time in as many weeks that a severe threat has caught defenders off guard. The threat, known as Dirty Frag, allows low-privilege users, including those using virtual machines, to gain root control of servers. Attacks are particularly suitable in shared environments, where a server is used by multiple parties. Hackers can also gain root as long as they have access to a separate exploit that gives a toehold into a machine. Exploit code was leaked online three days ago and works reliably across virtually all Linux distributions. Microsoft has said it has spotted signs that hackers are experimenting with Dirty Frag in the wild. Immediate and si
articles.title_zh: Linux 在短短兩週內遭遇第二個嚴重漏洞
articles.summary_zh: Linux 用戶遭遇了另一個漏洞，該漏洞允許容器和不受信任的使用者獲得 root 存取權限，這是短短兩週內第二次嚴重威脅讓防守方措手不及，該威脅名為 Dirty Frag，允許低權限使用者獲得提升的系統存取權限。

articles.title: Audi has a new Q9 flagship coming soon: Here's its interior
articles.summary: Audi provided flights from Washington, DC, to Munich, Germany, and accommodation so Ars could see the new Q9 (and drive something you can read about later). Ars does not accept paid editorial content. MUNICH—Later this summer, Audi will unveil its new flagship model. In the past, that role had been filled by the A8 , but that was before SUVs found so much favor; even in Europe, a majority of car buyers now swing that way. But forget Europe for a moment. The new Q9 is Audi's first full-size SUV, underscoring the importance of the North American market. Late in development, the company even redesigned the cupholders to fit those giant insulated mugs that briefly became a retail obsession. We can only show this exterior-camouflaged Q9 for now, but the photos show the production interior. Or a
articles.title_zh: 奧迪即將推出新 Q9 旗艦車型：內部曝光
articles.summary_zh: 奧迪提供從華盛頓特區飛往德國慕尼黑的航班和住宿，以便 Ars 查看新 Q9（並試駕稍後將報導的車型），奧迪將在今年夏季晚些時候推出其新旗艦車型。

articles.title: After banning foreign routers, FCC says existing ones can get updates until 2029
articles.summary: The Federal Communications Commission is relenting a bit on its restrictive router rules, saying it will allow foreign-made routers to receive software and firmware updates until at least January 1, 2029. The FCC also expanded the waiver to cover more types of software updates. Previously, the FCC said routers currently on the market or already sold to consumers could receive security patches and other updates only until March 1, 2027. On Friday, the agency announced a waiver extension that lets devices receive updates until January 1, 2029, and said the waiver may eventually become permanent. The software-update cutoff date is part of a sweeping set of rules the FCC announced in March. Claiming that restrictions are needed for national security reasons, the FCC imposed a ban on new hardwa
articles.title_zh: 禁止外國路由器後，美國聯邦通訊委員會表示現有路由器可接收更新至 2029 年
articles.summary_zh: 美國聯邦通訊委員會對其限制性路由器規則有所放鬆，表示將允許外國製造的路由器至少接收軟體和韌體更新至 2029 年 1 月 1 日，該委員會也擴大了豁免範圍以涵蓋更多類型的軟體更新。

articles.title: Data center guzzled 30 million gallons of water and nobody noticed for months
articles.summary: A curious case in Georgia serves as a warning for many parts of the US hastily approving data center developments without first updating their water systems to better monitor for severe upticks in usage. On Friday, Politico reported that one of the country's biggest data center developments had guzzled nearly 30 million gallons of water without paying for it. Even worse, the water grab came at a time when nearby drought-stricken residents were warned to restrict their personal water consumption and some reported sudden decreases in water pressure. An investigation conducted by utility officials in Georgia's Fayette County found that the Quality Technology Services (QTD) facility had two industrial-scale water hookups that weren't being monitored. "One water connection had been installed wi
articles.title_zh: 數據中心在數個月內耗水3000萬加侖，沒人發現
articles.summary_zh: 喬治亞州發生的案例警示許多美國地區在未更新水系統監測措施前倉促批准數據中心開發項目。該國最大的數據中心開發項目之一被發現大量耗水。

articles.title: Passengers from hantavirus ship arrive in US; 3 people in biocontainment
articles.summary: The cruise ship rocked by an unprecedented Andes hantavirus outbreak arrived in the Canary Islands off the coast of Tenerife Island over the weekend and is being evacuated. At least one new case has been identified amid the disembarkment. As of Monday morning, officials for the World Health Organization reported that the last of the passengers of the MV Hondius cruise ship are expected to be evacuated today. Thirty crew will remain on board and see the ship back to Rotterdam in the Netherlands. Prior to the evacuation there were 147 people on board. All of those evacuated from the ship are being transported off the island on specially arranged repatriation flights, not commercial flights. The evacuations and flights are being coordinated by Spanish authorities as well as the WHO and other
articles.title_zh: 郵輪乘客抵達美國；3人進入生物隔離
articles.summary_zh: 因安地斯漢他病毒爆發而備受關注的郵輪在週末抵達加那利群島特內里費島附近，並正進行疏散。在人員下船期間發現至少一例新確診病例。

articles.title: Starlink shuts down its GPS-style cheat code. Researchers may unlock it anyway.
articles.summary: Starlink is unceremoniously shutting down a GPS-style feature that most of the Internet satellite provider’s customers probably never realized existed. But that won’t stop broader momentum toward harnessing Starlink’s satellite constellation as a navigation alternative—especially when GPS jamming and spoofing have become more widespread. The Starlink satellite constellation owned by SpaceX is designed to provide communications services first and foremost, rather than pinpointing users’ locations like GPS and other global navigation satellite systems (GNSS). However, SpaceX publicly acknowledged in a May 2025 letter to the US Federal Communications Commission that Starlink could deliver positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) services. A handful of savvy Starlink customers had even been a
articles.title_zh: Starlink 關閉其 GPS 風格的作弊代碼，研究人員可能會破解它
articles.summary_zh: Starlink 悄然關閉了一項 GPS 風格的功能，大多數 Starlink 客戶可能從未意識到該功能的存在。但這不會阻止利用 Starlink 衛星星座作為導航替代方案的廣泛動力。

articles.title: iOS, macOS, and iPadOS 26.5 updates arrive with encrypted RCS messaging and more
articles.summary: Apple has released version 26.5 of all of its operating systems today: iOS 26.5 , iPadOS 26.5 , macOS 26.5 , watchOS 26.5 , tvOS 26.5 , visionOS 26.5 , and version 26.5 of the HomePod software (whew). None of these are particularly momentous updates, which is pretty normal this late in their lifecycle, but they add a small batch of new features alongside the pile of patches outlined on Apple’s security vulnerabilities page. This is Apple’s first release to support end-to-end encryption for the RCS messaging standard , for example, which, when enabled, can give green-bubble messages some of the same security and privacy advantages that iMessage users have long enjoyed. Encrypted RCS messaging has a “beta” label in this release, and Apple says it’s limited to a subset of supported cellular c
articles.title_zh: iOS、macOS 和 iPadOS 26.5 更新推出，增加加密 RCS 訊息功能
articles.summary_zh: Apple 今天發布了所有作業系統的 26.5 版本：iOS 26.5、iPadOS 26.5、macOS 26.5、watchOS 26.5、tvOS 26.5、visionOS 26.5 和 HomePod 軟體 26.5 版。這些都不是特別重大的更新，這在其生命週期的這個階段很正常。

articles.title: Samsung made a “mockery” of Dua Lipa by putting her picture on TV boxes, lawsuit says
articles.summary: About a year ago, I was in my parents’ living room, where a new TV sat in its box, waiting to be set up. My sister-in-law pointed to a woman on the packaging and said, “Oh, that’s Dua Lipa!” I barely know who she is, so I didn’t think it was unusual for the singer to be featured on the box. But at least one person thinks it's a big deal: Lipa herself. On Friday, Lipa filed a lawsuit against Samsung for using her image on some of its TV boxes, alleging that its use constitutes copyright infringement, trademark infringement, and a violation of her right of publicity. The complaint ( PDF ), filed in the US District Court for the Central District of California, says that Lipa owns all “rights, title, and interest in the image titled ‘Dua Lipa - Backstage at Austin City Limits, 2024.’” “Samsung
articles.title_zh: Samsung 將 Dua Lipa 的照片放在電視盒上，訴訟稱其為「嘲笑」
articles.summary_zh: 大約一年前，在我父母的客廳裡，一台新電視盒等待設置。我的嫂子指著包裝上的一個女人說，「那是 Dua Lipa！」但律師稱 Samsung 此舉為對這位歌手的嘲笑。

articles.title: iPhone與Android互傳訊息更安全，iOS 26.5支援RCS端到端加密
articles.summary: 蘋果與Google週一（5/11）同步宣布，從iOS 26.5版開始，RCS（Rich Communication Services，豐富通

articles.title: 針對Checkmarx發布的Jenkins AST外掛遭駭，TeamPCP聲稱是他們所為
articles.summary: 5月9日資安公司Checkmarx發出警告，該公司推出的Jenkins AST外掛程式遭供應鏈攻擊，駭客上架有問題的新版本，要用戶採取行動因應，有資安研究員公布更多細節。
articles.title_zh: 針對Checkmarx發布的Jenkins AST外掛遭駭，TeamPCP聲稱是他們所為

articles.title: Google發布ChromeOS長期支援版更新，修補多項高風險記憶體漏洞
articles.summary: Google發布ChromeOS作業系統長期支援版（Long Term Support）新版本，將LTS-144版更新至144.0.7559.250版，同時修補11項漏洞，多數屬於高風險的記憶體類型問題。

articles.title: 中國業者公布雙核心量子電腦
articles.summary:
中國業者中科酷原科技近日公布其最新量子電腦新進展，宣稱打造出全球首臺雙核量子電腦，具有能協同運作、但低功耗及體積小等優點。
總部位於武漢的中科酷原科技2024年推出中國首座商用中性原子量子電腦，名為漢原1號。漢原2號為升級版。該系統採用中國移動五嶽紀元（WuYueOS）量子計算作業系統，宣稱是全球首次量子運算領域引入「雙核」概念；在單一機箱中同時操作兩套不同的中性原子陣列，包括100個⁸⁷Rb（銣-87）原子和100個⁸⁵Rb（銣-85）原子。藉此實現雙核協作運算。

articles.title: 汽車大廠Skoda網路商店被駭，疑外洩客戶個資
articles.summary:
捷克汽車大廠Skoda公告，其線上商店平臺遭駭，警告客戶姓名、電子郵件信箱等個資可能遭存取。
Skoda的安全監控團隊發現異常活動。在發現後該公司立即將網站下線並修補漏洞。事後Skoda研判，駭客是濫用其運行線上商店的標準商店軟體的漏洞，可能存取線上商店平臺處理的資料。
